steps.name: User is logged in successfully and is redirected to application homepage
User navigate from "Reference Data" menu option to "Absence Reason"
User Create new "AR_Test_6903" with following "Vacation" "," and "Public to Employee"
User Logout from application and logged in again with "appUsername" "appPassword"
User navigate from "Master Data" menu option to "Employee" sub menu to "General Information"
user creates employee with required details
User navigate from "Absences" menu option to "Create Absence"
User Clicks on the Day Picker and Select Date as "1"
Employee Create new absence with following "AR_Test_6903" "4"
User Will click on Create Absence button
Absence is created with the reason
